testimonials.name: Sophie Larguet
testimonials.content: Before, I spent hours sorting CVs. Now I directly receive profiles that match my needs.

testimonials.name: Mehdi Khelif
testimonials.content: I had applied everywhere with no response. Here, I created my profile in 2 minutes and a recruiter contacted me a few days later.

testimonials.name: Karim Ben Ali
testimonials.content: The transparency convinced me. I know how much I'll pay, for which profiles, and I only pay upon integration.
